caption: A man with fair skin and short brown hair is seen in a picture-in-picture window in the corner of a video game screen. He is wearing a dark shirt and is positioned in front of a background featuring a decorated Christmas tree. The game interface displays a "SUBSTITUTION" screen for the "Current Position" of "TE2," with a note stating "No other positions." On-screen text includes numbers such as "173,037," "14,600," and "2,343,543." The screen shows player profiles for "KHAIR BLASINGAME" and "TYLER HIGBEE," listing "KEY ATTRIBUTES" like "HEIGHT," "SPEED," and "CATCHING." As the sequence progresses, the available players list expands to show several player cards with varying ratings, including "CHIGOZIOM OKONKWO." The man in the inset window remains present throughout, reacting as the user navigates the team management menu.
